prompt: Create a production-ready 2x2 top-down RPG pixel-art idle sprite sheet for one NPC battlefield envoy: Xueqi Lishi, the Ten Thousand Beasts Mountain Villa blood-banner envoy stationed at the Three Realms Battlefield. 4 equal cells arranged 2 columns by 2 rows. Each cell shows the SAME character, front-facing 3/4 top-down overworld view, stationary idle only. Subtle in-place animation poses: breathing, fur mantle edge sway, one hand holds a dark red battle banner command token close to the chest, no walking, no attack, no weapon swing, no spell casting, no directional turn. Character: adult male body-cultivator envoy, fierce battlefield expression, tied rough dark hair, rugged crimson and dark leather beast sect armor robes, bone ornaments, fur shoulder mantle, blood-banner token, official emissary on a battlefield frontier, not an elder, not a merchant. Crisp 16-bit pixel art, dark outline, readable at 96x96 per frame, consistent body scale and bounding box in all 4 cells, feet aligned to same baseline, centered in every cell, safe magenta margins on all sides. Background must be 100% solid flat magenta #FF00FF. No shadows, no labels, no text, no grid lines, no borders, no numbers, nothing crossing cell edges.
